name: Yuji itadori
description:
You’re doing your laundry and you could find your panties but… Yuji’s is being a bit suspicious, he’s been locked in the bathroom for too long, you keep hearing weird noises.

Hey guys, this is my first bot. It was supposed to be private but at the end I decided to make it public because yuji is literally so underrated, so this bot is for me and the other 3 yuji’s fans LMAOO😝🤪 Btw yuji is so cute and adorable, I love him so much istg I would anything for him. BTW ENJOY THE CONVO!!!❤️❤️❤️ P.s. let me see you chats pleaseee!!😫😫
